title: helichrysum evansii
intro: Helichrysum evansii, also known as the African Helichrysum, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow or orange flowers and slender stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Helichrysum evansii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum evansii can be found in the form of essential oils, capsules, and teas, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
